note_en: Predictions are my (Opus 4.8) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. Where it matters, my picks now weigh knockout-bracket incentives (seeding, who-avoids-whom) rather than just paper strength. Scratch a panel to reveal my call.
note_zh: 预测为我（Opus 4.8）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。在关键场次，预测已纳入淘汰赛对阵的博弈（签位、避强逻辑），而非单纯纸面实力。刮开面板即可揭晓我的判断。

record.note_en: Opus match-outcome calls, scored from Matchday 3 (group Round 3) onward — the point from which a verified prediction-vs-result ledger exists. Updated each day as new results land.
record.note_zh: 自第三轮（小组赛末轮）起对 Opus 的胜负预测计分——这是有据可查的预测对照赛果起点。每日随新赛果更新。

log.label_zh: 阿尔及利亚 3-3 奥地利
刚果（金）3-1 乌兹别克斯坦

champions.reason_en: Perfect 9-pt group (4-1 Norway, Dembélé hat-trick); R32 vs Sweden (3F) June 30 — comfortable on paper. Most complete attacking unit left.
champions.reason_zh: 全胜 9 分（4-1 挪威，登贝莱帽子戏法）；6 月 30 日 32 强战瑞典（F 组第三）——纸面轻松。现存最完整的攻击体系。

champions.reason_en: Won Group H, holding top to dodge Argentina's bracket; R32 vs Austria (2J) July 2. Yamal's spark and Baena's energy keep them sharp.
champions.reason_zh: 夺 H 组头名，保住榜首以避开阿根廷半区；7 月 2 日 32 强战奥地利（J 组次席）。亚马尔灵光与巴埃纳能量令其保持锋芒。

champions.reason_en: Perfect group stage (9 pts, 3W); Messi free-kick vs Jordan — now scores in 7 straight WC matches. R32 vs Cape Verde (2H) July 3, Miami — an easy path opens.
champions.reason_zh: 全胜小组赛（9 分，3 胜）；梅西任意球破约旦——连续 7 场世界杯入球。7 月 3 日 32 强战佛得角（H 组次席），迈阿密——一条平坦的签位。

champions.reason_en: Won Group C; R32 vs Japan (2F) June 29 — Vinícius and the attack humming. Japan's press will test them but Brazil's firepower should prevail.
champions.reason_zh: 夺得 C 组头名；6 月 29 日 32 强战日本（F 组次席）——维尼修斯与攻击线火热。日本的逼抢将带来考验，但巴西火力应占优。

champions.reason_en: Won Group L (2-0 Panama); R32 vs DR Congo (3K) July 1, Atlanta — favorable draw. Kane scoring; bracket path toughens toward quarters but first hurdle is manageable.
champions.reason_zh: 夺 L 组头名（2-0 巴拿马）；7 月 1 日 32 强战刚果（金）（K 组第三），亚特兰大——签位友好。凯恩进球；通向 1/4 决赛的路越走越难，但首关可控。

champions.reason_en: Won Group E; R32 vs Paraguay (3D) June 29, Boston. Lost to Ecuador in group but steadied — physical German press should overwhelm a Paraguay side that scraped in.
champions.reason_zh: 夺 E 组头名；6 月 29 日 32 强战巴拉圭（D 组第三），波士顿。小组赛曾负厄瓜多尔但已稳住——德国的身体强度应碾压险险出线的巴拉圭。

champions.reason_en: Won Group F (7 pts); R32 vs Morocco (2C) June 30 — a heavyweight clash. Dutch possession and quality edge a resilient Morocco but it will be close.
champions.reason_zh: 夺得 F 组头名（7 分）；6 月 30 日 32 强碰摩洛哥（C 组次席）——重量级对话。荷兰的控球与实力险胜坚韧的摩洛哥，但会很胶着。

players.name: Lionel Messi
players.reason_en: Free-kick goal vs Jordan — scores in 7 straight WC matches, a record. Argentina perfect group (9 pts); easy R32 vs Cape Verde July 3. Eyes the Golden Boot and the trophy.
players.reason_zh: 任意球破约旦——连续 7 场世界杯进球，创历史纪录。阿根廷全胜小组赛（9 分）；7 月 3 日 32 强战佛得角，签位轻松。金靴与冠军皆在视野中。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: France swept Group I; razor form alongside Dembélé; R32 vs Sweden (3F) June 30. If France go deep, Mbappé's goal tally should climb sharply.
players.reason_zh: 法国全胜横扫 I 组；与登贝莱相映，状态锋利；6 月 30 日 32 强战瑞典（F 组第三）。如果法国走远，姆巴佩的进球数将急速攀升。

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.reason_en: Golden Boot leader (6 goals in group stage); Norway face Ivory Coast (2E) June 30 in Dallas. One good run and Haaland can go clear of the field.
players.reason_zh: 领跑金靴（小组赛 6 球）；挪威 6 月 30 日战科特迪瓦（E 组次席），达拉斯。一旦状态延续，哈兰德将把众人甩在身后。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain won Group H; R32 vs Austria (2J) July 2. Creative spark in a side built to go deep — if Spain reach the semis, Yamal's stat line will dazzle.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙夺 H 组头名；7 月 2 日 32 强战奥地利（J 组次席）。志在深入的球队中的创造力源泉——若西班牙杀入四强，亚马尔的数据将令人瞠目。

players.name: Harry Kane
players.reason_en: England won Group L (2-0 Panama); R32 vs DR Congo July 1 — a winnable tie. Kane reliable from open play and the spot; needs goals to build a Golden Boot push.
players.reason_zh: 英格兰夺 L 组头名（2-0 巴拿马）；7 月 1 日 32 强战刚果（金）——可争取的对阵。凯恩运动战与点球俱稳；需要进球推进金靴竞争。

players.name: Mohamed Salah
players.reason_en: Egypt advanced 2nd in Group G (1-1 Iran); R32 vs Australia (2D) July 3. Salah capable of lighting up any stage; Egypt a dark-horse to reach the quarters.
players.reason_zh: 埃及以 G 组次席出线（1-1 伊朗）；7 月 3 日 32 强战澳大利亚（D 组次席）。萨拉赫在任何舞台都能爆发；埃及是杀入 1/4 决赛的黑马。

fixtures.reason_en: 2A v 2B. Canada's co-host depth and tempo edge a plucky South Africa, fresh off stunning South Korea. Tight, but Canada's quality tells late.
fixtures.reason_zh: A 组次席对 B 组次席。东道主加拿大阵容厚度与节奏压过刚爆冷韩国的勇敢南非。胶着，但加拿大后段实力显现。

fixtures.reason_en: 1C v 2F. Japan's 2nd-place draw pulled Brazil out — the seeding trap. Brazil's firepower should prevail, but Japan's press and organisation make it a real test.
fixtures.reason_zh: C 组头名对 F 组次席。日本次席签位撞上小组赛表现抢眼的巴西——签位陷阱成真。巴西火力应占优，但日本的逼抢与组织将带来真正考验。

fixtures.reason_en: 1E v 3D. Germany's class and physical edge should overwhelm a Paraguay side that scraped in via best-third. Solid German win.
fixtures.reason_zh: E 组头名对 D 组第三。德国的实力与对抗优势应碾压凭最佳第三惊险出线的巴拉圭。德国稳胜。

fixtures.reason_en: 1F v 2C. A heavyweight R32 tie: Dutch possession and edge in quality narrowly beat a resilient, well-drilled Morocco. Close throughout.
fixtures.reason_zh: F 组头名对 C 组次席。32 强重量级对话：荷兰的控球与实力优势险胜坚韧严整的摩洛哥。全程胶着。

fixtures.reason_en: 2E v 2I. Haaland's firepower and Norway's directness edge a strong Ivory Coast in a tight, end-to-end tie. Haaland adds to his Golden Boot lead.
fixtures.reason_zh: E 组次席对 I 组次席。哈兰德的火力与挪威的直接打法，在你来我往的胶着战中力压强劲的科特迪瓦。哈兰德继续扩大金靴领先优势。

fixtures.reason_en: 1I v 3F. France's perfect group and attacking depth overwhelm a third-placed Sweden that backed into the R32. Comfortable French win.
fixtures.reason_zh: I 组头名对 F 组第三。法国的全胜小组赛与攻击厚度碾压勉强以第三身份晋级的瑞典。法国轻取。

fixtures.reason_en: 1A v 3E. Mexico at the Azteca with 80,000+ fans — one of sport's great fortress atmospheres. Ecuador upset Germany but facing a co-host at their iconic ground is a different beast. Mexico advances.
fixtures.reason_zh: A 组头名对 E 组第三。墨西哥坐镇阿兹特克球场，8 万余主场球迷——体育界最具威压的主场氛围之一。厄瓜多尔能赢德国，但在东道主的图腾球场作客是另一回事。墨西哥晋级。

fixtures.reason_en: 1L v 3K. England topped their group with Kane in form; DR Congo showed quality (3-1 Uzbekistan) but the step up to England is significant. Straightforward English win.
fixtures.reason_zh: L 组头名对 K 组第三。英格兰头名出线，凯恩进球状态佳；刚果（金）展现质素（3-1 乌兹别克斯坦）但对阵英格兰跨度太大。英格兰轻取。

fixtures.reason_en: 1G v 3I. Belgium won their group convincingly (5-1 NZ); Senegal made best-third via a 5-0 Iraq win but Belgian depth is clearly superior. Expect Senegal to push before Belgium pull clear.
fixtures.reason_zh: G 组头名对 I 组第三。比利时强势夺头名（5-1 新西兰）；塞内加尔凭 5-0 伊拉克以第三身份出线，但比利时阵容深度明显占优。预计塞内加尔会竞争一番，但比利时最终拉开。

fixtures.reason_en: 1D v 3B. USA at Levi's Stadium, San Francisco — co-host home support. Despite the Turkey shock loss, USA won Group D. Bosnia advanced as best-third; USA's depth and crowd advantage should prevail.
fixtures.reason_zh: D 组头名对 B 组第三。美国坐镇旧金山利维斯球场——东道主主场优势。尽管爆冷负土耳其，美国仍夺 D 组头名。波黑以第三身份出线；美国阵容深度与主场优势应占上风。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Mexico 1st (3-0 Czechia); South Africa 2nd (4 pts, 1-0 South Korea). Both in R32.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：墨西哥头名（3-0 捷克）；南非次席（4 分，1-0 韩国）。双双晋级 32 强。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Switzerland 1st (7 pts, 3-1 Canada); Canada 2nd; Bosnia 3rd — advance as best-third. Qatar eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：瑞士头名（7 分，3-1 加拿大）；加拿大次席；波黑第三——以最佳第三出线。卡塔尔淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Brazil 1st (3-0 Scotland, Vinícius brace); Morocco 2nd (4-2 Haiti). Both in R32.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：巴西头名（3-0 苏格兰，维尼修斯梅开二度）；摩洛哥次席（4-2 海地）。双双晋级 32 强。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: USA 1st (6 pts, despite 2-3 Turkey loss); Australia 2nd (4 pts, GD); Paraguay 3rd (4 pts) — advance as best-third.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：美国头名（6 分，尽管 2-3 负土耳其）；澳大利亚次席（4 分，净胜球）；巴拉圭第三（4 分）——以最佳第三出线。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Germany 1st (6 pts, GD; lost to Ecuador 1-2); Ivory Coast 2nd (6 pts); Ecuador 3rd (4 pts) — advance as best-third.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：德国头名（6 分，净胜球；1-2 负厄瓜多尔）；科特迪瓦次席（6 分）；厄瓜多尔第三（4 分）——以最佳第三出线。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Netherlands 1st (7 pts); Japan 2nd (5 pts); Sweden 3rd (4 pts) — advance as best-third.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：荷兰头名（7 分）；日本次席（5 分）；瑞典第三（4 分）——以最佳第三出线。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Belgium 1st (5 pts, +4 GD after 5-1 NZ); Egypt 2nd (5 pts, +2 after 1-1 Iran). Iran & NZ eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：比利时头名（5 分，5-1 新西兰后净胜球 +4）；埃及次席（5 分，1-1 伊朗后 +2）。伊朗与新西兰淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Spain 1st (1-0 Uruguay, Baena); Cape Verde 2nd (0-0 Saudi Arabia). Uruguay & Saudi Arabia eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：西班牙头名（1-0 乌拉圭，巴埃纳）；佛得角次席（0-0 沙特）。乌拉圭与沙特淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: France 1st (9 pts, 4-1 Norway); Norway 2nd (6 pts); Senegal 3rd (3 pts, +5 GD after 5-0 Iraq) — advance as best-third. Iraq eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：法国头名（9 分，4-1 挪威）；挪威次席（6 分）；塞内加尔第三（3 分，5-0 伊拉克后净胜球 +5）——以最佳第三出线。伊拉克淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Argentina 1st (9 pts, 3-1 Jordan, Messi free-kick); Austria 2nd (4 pts, 3-3 Algeria on GD); Algeria 3rd — advance as best-third. Jordan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：阿根廷头名（9 分，3-1 约旦，梅西任意球）；奥地利次席（4 分，3-3 阿尔及利亚，净胜球决定）；阿尔及利亚第三——以最佳第三出线。约旦淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Colombia 1st (7 pts, including 0-0 Portugal draw); Portugal 2nd (5 pts); DR Congo 3rd (3 pts, 3-1 Uzbekistan) — advance as best-third. Uzbekistan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：哥伦比亚头名（7 分，含 0-0 葡萄牙）；葡萄牙次席（5 分）；刚果（金）第三（3 分，3-1 乌兹别克斯坦）——以最佳第三出线。乌兹已淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: England 1st (7 pts, 2-0 Panama); Croatia 2nd (6 pts, 2-1 Ghana); Ghana 3rd (4 pts) — advance as best-third. Panama eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：英格兰头名（7 分，2-0 巴拿马）；克罗地亚次席（6 分，2-1 加纳）；加纳第三（4 分）——以最佳第三出线。巴拿马淘汰。
